mapper.sql: id, order_no, item_no, model_no, status, unit_qty, quantity, allocated_qty, stock_no, stock_type, order_type, parent_rorder_id, parent_order_no, parent_modelno, exp_dlvtype, ass_type, price, agent_salesprice, eprice, taxrate, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo._rcvdetail_ass
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo._rcvdetail_ass (id, order_no, item_no, model_no, status, unit_qty, quantity, allocated_qty, stock_no, stock_type, order_type, parent_rorder_id, parent_order_no, parent_modelno, exp_dlvtype, ass_type, price, agent_salesprice, eprice, taxrate, create_time, create_user, update_time, update_user ) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{unitQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{allocatedQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{stockNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stockType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{parentRorderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{parentOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentModelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expDlvtype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{assType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{agentSalesprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

update dbo._rcvdetail_ass
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{record.itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
unit_qty = #{record.unitQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},

parent_modelno = #{record.parentModelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

ass_type = #{record.assType,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},

eprice = #{record.eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
taxrate = #{record.taxrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},

create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo._rcvdetail_ass set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, order_no = #{record.orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, item_no = #{record.itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, unit_qty = #{record.unitQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, allocated_qty = #{record.allocatedQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, stock_no = #{record.stockNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stock_type = #{record.stockType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_type = #{record.orderType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, parent_rorder_id = #{record.parentRorderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, parent_order_no = #{record.parentOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_modelno = #{record.parentModelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exp_dlvtype = #{record.expDlvtype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ass_type = #{record.assType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, price = #{record.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, agent_salesprice = #{record.agentSalesprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, eprice = #{record.eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, taxrate = #{record.taxrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo._rcvdetail_ass
order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER},
unit_qty = #{unitQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
allocated_qty = #{allocatedQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
stock_no = #{stockNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stock_type = #{stockType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_type = #{orderType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
parent_rorder_id = #{parentRorderId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
parent_order_no = #{parentOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
parent_modelno = #{parentModelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
exp_dlvtype = #{expDlvtype,jdbcType=INTEGER},
ass_type = #{assType,jdbcType=SMALLINT},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
agent_salesprice = #{agentSalesprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
eprice = #{eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
taxrate = #{taxrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo._rcvdetail_ass set order_no = #{orderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, item_no = #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, unit_qty = #{unitQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, allocated_qty = #{allocatedQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, stock_no = #{stockNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stock_type = #{stockType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_type = #{orderType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, parent_rorder_id = #{parentRorderId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, parent_order_no = #{parentOrderNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_modelno = #{parentModelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exp_dlvtype = #{expDlvtype,jdbcType=INTEGER}, ass_type = #{assType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, agent_salesprice = #{agentSalesprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, eprice = #{eprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, taxrate = #{taxrate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
